sections.heading: Full text
sections.text:
Zambia Police (Amendment) [No.30 of 2016 641
GOVERNMENT OF ZAMBIA
ACT
No. 30 of 2016
Date of Assent: 6th June, 2016
An Act to amend the Zambia Police Act.
[ 7th June, 2016
ENACTED by the Parliament of Zambia. Enactment
1. This Act may be cited as the Zambia Police (Amendment) Short title
Act, 2016, and shall be read as one with the Zambia Police Act, in Cap. 107
this Act referred to as the principal Act.
2. The principal Act is amended by the repeal of Part XA. Repeal of
Part XA
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10100 Lusaka. Price K4.00
642
